honesty: Offline default accuracy = config-driven rule RCA on synthetic EvidencePack (L0 catalog regression). strict accuracy requires class+service+Jaccard≥0.50 (no keyword-only). Not production ML. Use evaluate_live_e2e.py for runtime; hard split for OOD.

scoring.default: Jaccard≥0.40 OR GT⊂pred OR keywords+class (catalog regression)
scoring.strict: class+service OK AND (Jaccard≥0.50 OR GT⊂pred); no keyword-only
